supersedes: v1.3 (review cycle 4, 2026-07-17: WITHHELD, 24 findings + test gaps, prioritized 1-12).
status: DRAFT — all 24 cycle-4 findings processed; most closed in code+tests; explicitly open: the signed launch attestation (5, 16, 23), the in-image/production-binding runs, the final commit, and the formal _qp_matrices contract (24). No Stage-3 instance has been run.

corrections_from_review_v4.1_harness_ran_numerics_before_preflight: FIXED (highest priority) — the harness runs the preflight gate FIRST; on failure it persists a FAIL artifact and executes NO numerical case
corrections_from_review_v4.2_invalid_run_accepts_qualified_primary: FIXED — pre-fallback INVALID_RUN requires primary.enum == INTEGRITY_DEFECT; test covers every inadmissible primary enum
corrections_from_review_v4.3_orchestration_toctou: FIXED — orchestrate canonicalizes every row ONCE before hashing; the resolver provably receives read-only records (test asserts writeable is False)
corrections_from_review_v4.4_capture_corpus_not_proven_fresh: FIXED — CORPUS must be empty (never silently cleared); jp._solve_qp saved/restored in try/finally
corrections_from_review_v4.5_execution_package_hash_never_verified: FIXED — verify_execution_package hashes the ACTUAL package bytes vs authorization.execution_package_sha256 + record_type + exact supported version; the artifact-hash CHANNEL remains operator-supplied until the launch attestation (open)
corrections_from_review_v4.6_row_manifest_protocol_not_enforced: FIXED — frozen ROW_MANIFEST_PROTOCOL='MR002_STAGE3_ROW_IDENTITY_V1', exact-matched in authorization + recorded in run provenance
corrections_from_review_v4.7_authorization_version_countersigner_we: FIXED — exact version '1.0', record_status IMMUTABLE, authorized_date, countersigned_by == 'Jay Wang (owner)', execution_package_version exact
corrections_from_review_v4.8_pins_no_semantic_schema: FIXED — record_type/version/IMMUTABLE/repository enforced; corpus_hash MANDATORY (source-code default removed)
corrections_from_review_v4.9_record_hashes_not_semantic: FIXED — verify_numerical_evidence_record replays ratios→arrays→nested hashes→invariants for every record; aggregate_verdict calls it (tampered-ratio test passes the checksum but fails the replay)
corrections_from_review_v4.10_record_sha_not_authentication: FIXED (wording) — record_sha256=consistency checksum; checkpoint_sha256=whole-file binding; externally preserved run manifest=authenticity boundary
corrections_from_review_v4.11_close_failure_could_pass: FIXED — PASS additionally requires evidence_persisted and not stopped; close failure → stopped+sidecar (test pins passed=False/stopped=True/persisted=False)
corrections_from_review_v4.12_partial_write_reported_persisted: FIXED — record-write failures get their own handler: evidence_persisted=False + sidecar ALWAYS, regardless of the terminal append
corrections_from_review_v4.13_orchestration_exceptions_not_persiste: FIXED — _orchestration_emergency writes a run-level artifact (with checkpoint hash + corruption state) for every orchestration exception; OrchestrationResult.evidence_persisted reports it
corrections_from_review_v4.14_window_error_escapes: FIXED — WindowAccessError becomes a governed REFUSED with a preserved emergency artifact
corrections_from_review_v4.15_run_manifest_not_verified: FIXED — post-write full-canonical-hash verification + run_manifest_sha256 exposed on the result
corrections_from_review_v4.16_output_root_races: ACKNOWLEDGED — controls documented as not race-proof; descriptor-held launcher hardening belongs to the launch attestation
corrections_from_review_v4.17_population_size_not_enforced: FIXED — EXPECTED_CORPUS_INSTANCES=3895 pinned; production_corpus_source refuses on count mismatch before hashing
corrections_from_review_v4.18_cert_presence_not_value: FIXED — finiteness, interval ordering, nonnegative-int clip count enforced in validate_outcome; full re-certification remains the replay function
corrections_from_review_v4.19_cert_mutable: FIXED — accepted certificates snapshotted into frozen CertSnapshot at normalization; missing fields cannot be accepted
corrections_from_review_v4.20_declared_config_not_verified: FIXED — verify_source checks declared_config, pending list, and governance key-set equality
corrections_from_review_v4.21_governance_verification_incomplete: FIXED — governance artifacts checked for sha256 + git blob + byte length; exact allowed path set
corrections_from_review_v4.22_corpus_db_not_bound: FIXED — _database_provenance (sha256/bytes/path) recorded in run provenance; the derived corpus hash remains the authority
corrections_from_review_v4.23_native_binaries: OPEN — image digest + signed launch attestation
corrections_from_review_v4.24_qp_matrices_contract: OPEN — required before countersignature, not optional documentation

remaining_before_execution_countersignat: signed launch attestation (authorization-hash channel, image/OCI identity, native binaries, output-root descriptor hardening) — findings 5, 16, 23
final implementation commit + tree; full 64-hex OCI config digest
countersigned expected-pins + execution-authorization artifacts (exact schemas now enforced in code)
in-image realism-harness PASS (preflight-first) + final in-image test report with the production-binding test RUN
the formally-enumerated _qp_matrices input contract vs validate_model_inputs — finding 24
scope_boundary: This package authorizes NOTHING to execute. MR002_Implementation_Erratum_v1.0 remains SUSPENDED; the quarantined AMENDED PASS remains non-reusable; preflight CLOSED; performance NOT COMPUTED; validation and sealed OOS SEALED AND UNREAD.
